description: An octagonal painting showing a classical allegorical scene. On the right, a tall woman in a blue and pink gown stands gracefully. On the left, a muscular male figure in classical dress gestures toward her while other figures, including a woman and a small child (putto), sit nearby. A circular domed rotunda or temple stands in the center background. The palette is warm with earth tones and muted colors. Scattered flowers or objects lie on the ground.
